title: EaseonSS - EnderBuff
description: Permanent buff effect system using Ender Chest
body:
## 🌿 Easeon - EnderBuff **Requires:** [EaseonSS-Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/easeon-ss-core) ## Overview EnderBuff gives players **permanent potion effects** based on items stored in their **Ender Chest**. Works server-side only—no client installation needed.
## Supported Buff Items
🧪 Potion Setup ![Potion Setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Uz9vixwO/images/6ee3bf738fd48c1fd51bd17abeb8dd595754c2ff.png)
- Regular, Splash, and Lingering - **Level 1:** Potion I + Totem of Undying + Diamond Block - **Level 2:** Potion II+ Totem of Undying + Netherite Block - **Applies the corresponding potion effect.**
⛏ Pickaxe Setup (Haste) ![Pickaxe Setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Uz9vixwO/images/d6c77b9c10a3c295d9a7902ea6f8c295a1e257f5.png)
- **Diamond Pickaxe** + Totem of Undying + Diamond Block → **Haste I** - **Netherite Pickaxe** + Totem of Undying + Netherite Block → **Haste II** *(Full durability required)*
🛡 Armor Setup (Resistance) ![Armor Setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Uz9vixwO/images/3ea13296bd1ac68a320c78d9bade4849fec23bab.png)
- **Diamond Chestplate** + Totem of Undying + Diamond Block → **Resistance I** - **Netherite Chestplate** + Totem of Undying + Netherite Block → **Resistance II** *(Full durability required)*
🌊 Conduit Setup (Conduit Power) ![Conduit Setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Uz9vixwO/images/5a92610b284640701a267ae0bd03214473c2926e.png)
- **Conduit** + Totem of Undying + Netherite Block → **Conduit Power I** *(Grants water breathing, underwater vision, and increased mining speed within a certain range, regardless of structure completeness.)*
🍎 Golden Apple Setup (Saturation) ![Golden Apple Saturation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Uz9vixwO/images/b02d3c62e7b29b0832cb4ca331f432c97daab6c0.png)
- **Enchanted Golden Apple** + Totem of Undying + Diamond Block → **Saturation I**
💚 Golden Apple Setup (Health Boost) ![Golden Apple Health Boost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Uz9vixwO/images/71ef710f377ed1a7faf4b3a2f8227bbce6bbd158.png)
- **Enchanted Golden Apple** + Totem of Undying + Netherite Block → **Health Boost** - Health Boost level scales with the minimum count of apples and netherite blocks - Example: 2 apples + 2 blocks = Health Boost II, 3 apples + 3 blocks = Health Boost III
🪽 Elytra Setup (Glider) ![Elytra Setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Uz9vixwO/images/00d935bc477e746a208a7dd6c01d5f854881787c.png)
- **Elytra** + Totem of Undying + Netherite Block → **Glider Effect** - **Chestplate armor must be worn** to gain glider effect - Effect automatically removes when conditions are not met or armor is removed - Does not require elytra to be worn
## Commands All commands require OP level 2 permission. | Command | Description | | ---------------------------- | -------------------- | | /easeon enderbuff | View current status | | /easeon enderbuff | Enable/disable |
Configuration ```json { "enabled": true, "requiredOpLevel": 2, // Requires a server restart to take effect. } ``` `config/easeon/easeon.ss.enderbuff.json`

--- ### 🔗 More Easeon Mods Looking for more lightweight and practical mods in the same style? Check out other Easeon series mods here.
